overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a student character in Gryffindor robes exploring a candlelit castle interior. The character walks along an ornate wood-paneled balcony, passes a large castle painting, and exits through a lattice door to a stone corridor overlooking a grand hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved wooden balcony with castle painting

events.description: interaction prompt UI appears indicating an object can be interacted with

agents.ego_description: walking along curved balcony admiring the large castle painting and ornate wood paneling

entered.detail: large framed painting depicting Hogwarts castle against a sunset sky
ornate dark wood balustrade following the curve of the balcony
iron chandelier with multiple lit candles hanging from ceiling
tall wooden door with geometric lattice windows
wall-mounted candle sconces between framed paintings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a candlelit wooden balcony with ornate paneling. A large painting of Hogwarts castle dominates the right wall while a chandelier hangs overhead. The warm lighting creates a cozy, historic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden paneled corridor approaching lattice door

events.description: character opens wooden lattice door and begins entering stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward the lattice door and opening it to exit the wooden balcony area

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the curved balcony, passing the chandelier and leaving the castle painting behind. The wooden lattice door approaches and is opened, revealing a stone corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone balcony overlooking grand hall with chandeliers

agents.ego_description: standing at stone railing looking down into the candlelit great hall below

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone block wall with mounted red Gryffindor banner
numerous hanging candle chandeliers illuminating the vaulted hall below
crenellated stone parapet with arched openings overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the door, the character enters a stone corridor with Gothic architecture. They walk to a crenellated stone railing and look down into a vast candlelit great hall filled with hanging chandeliers, creating a dramatic vertical perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cozy, wood-paneled interior into a vast, dramatic stone hall. It begins with the character walking along a candlelit balcony, passing beneath a chandelier and beside a large painting of the castle. As the character continues along the curve of the balcony, the warm wooden surroundings give way to a lattice door that opens into a Gothic stone corridor. The scene then shifts from the enclosed hallway to an open vantage point as the character approaches a crenellated railing. Finally, the perspective expands downward to reveal a massive, candlelit great hall filled with hanging chandeliers.
